latin: Heros quem meremur, non quem nunc opus est. eques obscurus in noctem fugit. culpam accepit ut alii innocentes manerent. silens custos.

questions.prompt: Why did the dark knight flee into the night?
questions.target: He took the blame so others could remain innocent
choices: He took the blame so others could remain innocent

questions.prompt: What kind of hero is the dark knight?
questions.target: A silent guardian the city deserves but doesn't need right now
choices: A silent guardian the city deserves but doesn't need right now

translation: The hero we deserve, not the one we need right now. The dark knight fled into the night. He accepted blame so that others could remain innocent. A silent guardian.
